message:
Add initial OpenCode transcript support

OpenCode converter improvements:
- Map tool names to unified format (apply_patch → Edit, explore → Explore, etc.)
- Skip TodoRead (redundant with TodoWrite)
- Strip unified diff headers from Edit tool diffs
- Format Grep output with numMatches, Glob with filenames array
- Format Read output with file.content structure
- Extract content for WebFetch, Skill, Explore tools
- Capitalize subagent types (Task with explore → Explore)

UI improvements for OpenCode tools:
- Add markdown rendering for WebFetch, Skill, Explore
- Show skill name in Skill tool collapsed view
- Show

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/igil2f1yocji4s5kmujiadz2"X matches" instead of "X lines" for Grep
- Add icons and descriptions for new tool types

Also includes:
- OpenCode plugin refactored to use CLI for uploads
- Test fixture with all OpenCode tools
- Setup script for OpenCode plugin installation

+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+# Setup script for developing the OpenCode plugin locally
+#
+# Usage:
+#   ./scripts/setup-opencode-plugin.sh          # Symlink plugin for dev
+#   ./scripts/setup-opencode-plugin.sh --remove # Remove symlink
+
+set -e
+
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+REPO_ROOT="$(dirname "$SCRIPT_DIR")"
+PLUGIN_SRC="$REPO_ROOT/packages/opencode/src/index.ts"
+OPENCODE_PLUGINS_DIR="$HOME/.config/opencode/plugins"
+SYMLINK_PATH="$OPENCODE_PLUGINS_DIR/agentlogs.ts"
+
+# Colors
+GREEN='\033[0;32m'
+YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
+RED='\033[0;31m'
+NC='\033[0m'
+
+if [[ "$1" == "--remove" ]]; then
+    if [[ -L "$SYMLINK_PATH" ]]; then
+        rm "$SYMLINK_PATH"
+        echo -e "${GREEN}✓${NC} Removed symlink: $SYMLINK_PATH"
+    else
+        echo -e "${YELLOW}!${NC} No symlink found at: $SYMLINK_PATH"
+    fi
+    exit 0
+fi
+
+if [[ ! -f "$PLUGIN_SRC" ]]; then
+    echo -e "${RED}✗${NC} Plugin not found: $PLUGIN_SRC"
+    exit 1
+fi
+
+mkdir -p "$OPENCODE_PLUGINS_DIR"
+
+# Remove existing symlink
+[[ -L "$SYMLINK_PATH" ]] && rm "$SYMLINK_PATH"
+
+ln -s "$PLUGIN_SRC" "$SYMLINK_PATH"
+echo -e "${GREEN}✓${NC} Symlinked: $SYMLINK_PATH -> $PLUGIN_SRC"
+
+echo ""
+echo "Plugin installed. Start OpenCode to load it."
+echo ""
+echo "For local dev, set VI_CLI_PATH:"
+echo "  export VI_CLI_PATH=\"bun $REPO_ROOT/packages/cli/src/index.ts\""
+echo ""
+echo "Watch logs:"
+echo "  tail -f /tmp/agentlogs-opencode.log"
